nasb.text: and when they had brought them to the chief magistrates, they said, “These men are throwing our city into confusion, being Jews,

esv.text: And when they had brought them to the magistrates, they said, “These men are Jews, and they are disturbing our city.

cnv.text: 又帶到裁判官面前，說：“這些人是猶太人，擾亂我們的城市，

ccb.text: 他们在官长面前控告保罗和西拉，说：“这些是犹太人，竟扰乱我们的城市，

csbs.text: 把两个人带到官长们面前，说：“这些人是犹太人，在扰乱我们的城市，
